description: Pearl Score Calculation Engine — dynamic 0-1000 score from FactorEngine with per-pillar sub-scores and score history

userStories.title: Create ScoreEngine service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pure-function service that takes Factor[] and returns a total score (0-1000) plus per-pillar sub-scores (0-200 each).
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/services/ScoreEngine.ts with calculateScore(factors: Factor[]): ScoreResult
ScoreResult type: { total: number; pillars: Record<Pillar, number> }
Each pillar starts at base 125 points (625 total baseline with no factors)
Each helping factor adds points by severity: info +10, attention +15, action +20
Each hurting factor subtracts points by severity: info -5, attention -15, action -30
Per-pillar scores clamped to 0-200 range
Total score is sum of all 5 pillar scores (0-1000)
Export calculateScore and ScoreResult from src/services/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create ScoreContext with AsyncStorage persistence
userStories.description: As a user, I want my score to persist and animate from the previous value when it changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/context/ScoreContext.tsx providing { score, previousScore, pillarScores, refreshScore }
Context uses generateAllFactors + calculateScore with data from DeviceContext, EquipmentContext, SymptomContext, OnboardingContext
Stores current score under pearl_score_current and previous under pearl_score_previous in AsyncStorage
On first load previousScore is null (no animation)
When score changes, old current becomes new previous
Export useScore hook and ScoreProvider from src/context/index.ts
Add ScoreProvider to App.tsx provider chain after DeviceProvider, EquipmentProvider, SymptomProvider, OnboardingProvider
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire dynamic score into MyHomeScreen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my real Pearl Score on the My Home tab.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove hardcoded const homeScore = 625 from MyHomeScreen
Import and use useScore from ScoreContext
Pass score and previousScore to ScoreDisplay component
Score updates when equipment, symptoms, readings, or onboarding data change
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show per-pillar sub-scores in PillarDetailScreen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see each pillar's individual score so I know which areas need improvement.
acceptanceCriteria: Import useScore in PillarDetailScreen
Display pillar sub-score next to status badge in header as 'X / 200' format
Sub-score text uses caption font size and pillar status color
Typecheck passes
